---
title: "Foreign Policy"
subtitle: "2,108 posts where this was the primary topic."
anchor-sections: false
---

<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>

<style>
  h1 { border-bottom-color: #415B6F !important; }
</style>


<div id="theme-volume" class="volume-chart"></div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var d = [{ x: ["2011", "2012", "2013", "2014", "2015", "2016", "2017", "2018", "2019", "2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024", "2025", "2026"], y: [67, 138, 164, 120, 98, 73, 120, 149, 230, 163, 2, 27, 173, 123, 287, 174],
                type: "bar", marker: { color: "#415B6F" } }];
    var l = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 35, l: 40 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      yaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      height: 260, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("theme-volume", d, l, {displayModeBar: false, responsive: true});
  })();
</script>


<p class="small-caps">Recurring phrases</p>
<span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#415B6F'>united states</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#415B6F'>middle east</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#415B6F'>donald trump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#415B6F'>https www</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#415B6F'>president donald</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#415B6F'>prime minister</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#415B6F'>states america</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#415B6F'>thank attention</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#415B6F'>president trump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#415B6F'>attention matter</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#415B6F'>russia ukraine</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#415B6F'>north korea</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#415B6F'>saudi arabia</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#415B6F'>president putin</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#415B6F'>com news</span>


::: {.muted}
Showing the top 40 posts ranked by how clearly they match this theme. Other secondary themes for each post are shown as chips.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="post-stream"><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 16, 2015  14:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;No deal is better than a bad deal. America out negotiated again. # Iran&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_621761403825860608" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/621761403825860608" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 20, 2018  19:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We protect the countries of the Middle East</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1042733544466989057" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1042733544466989057" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 13, 2023  00:21</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">“Why the Iran Deal Matters—It was the first in a series of hugely consequential lies that will shape our country as much as the Middle East”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111570250189995872" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111570250189995872" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 07, 2025  11:31</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Now that the nuclear arsenal being &quot;created&quot; by Iran has been totally OBLITERATED, it is very important to me that all Middle Eastern Countries join the Abraham Accords. This will insure PEACE IN THE MIDDLE EAST. Thank you for your attention to this matter!</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114987257158661963" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114987257158661963" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 01, 2015  20:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Now that Iran ripped us off by making one of the best deals of any kind in history</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_661004204962656256" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/661004204962656256" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 14, 2020  13:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @johnrobertsFox: Israel strikes its second peace deal with an Arab nation in the past month. First the UAE</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1305379728442847232" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1305379728442847232" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 14, 2023  15:31</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">https://www.tabletmag.com/sections/israel-middle-east/articles/why-iran-deal-matters</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111234086652182908" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111234086652182908" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 14, 2018  04:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Remember how badly Iran was behaving with the Iran Deal in place. They were trying to take over the Middle East by whatever means necessary. Now</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_995758467645353985" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/995758467645353985" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2012"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2012.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 13, 2012  12:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;With allies like Egypt and Libya</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_246295539992379392" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/246295539992379392" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 12, 2020  01:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Another HISTORIC breakthrough today! Our two GREAT friends Israel and the Kingdom of Bahrain agree to a Peace Deal – the second Arab country to make peace with Israel in 30 days!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1304464923469193217" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1304464923469193217" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 09, 2019  19:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Fighting between various groups that has been going on for hundreds of years. USA should never have been in Middle East. Moved our 50 soldiers out. Turkey MUST take over captured ISIS fighters that Europe refused to have returned. The stupid endless wars</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1181896127471333381" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1181896127471333381" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 13, 2020  06:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @LindseyGrahamSC: This agreement sets the Middle East on a new course of cooperation and economic integration.  Well done President @realDonaldTrump and his team.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1304902727164518401" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1304902727164518401" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2016"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 24, 2016  15:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The big loss yesterday for Israel in the United Nations will make it much harder to negotiate peace.Too bad</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_812773204561379330" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/812773204561379330" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 09, 2019  20:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The United States has spent EIGHT TRILLION DOLLARS fighting and policing in the Middle East. Thousands of our Great Soldiers have died or been badly wounded. Millions of people have died on the other side. GOING INTO THE MIDDLE EAST IS THE WORST DECISION EVER MADE.....&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1181905659568283648" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1181905659568283648" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 08, 2023  15:17</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">RT @marklevinshowTrump cut off funds to the Palestinians, unleashed unprecedented peace initiatives in the Abraham Accords, killed the Iran deal, was starving the Iranian regime of resources with crushing sanctions, and Biden not only reversed it all, including funding the Palestinians and Iran, but undermined Netanyahu at every turn, refused to meet with him, demanded that Israel make more concessions to the Palestinians. Appeasement and worse has consequences.</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111200057683176037" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111200057683176037" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 15, 2025  13:41</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Iran and Israel should make a deal, and will make a deal, just like I got India and Pakistan to make, in that case by using TRADE with the United States to bring reason, cohesion, and sanity into the talks with two excellent leaders who were able to quickly make a decision and STOP!  Also, during my first term, Serbia and Kosovo were going at it hot and heavy, as they have for many decades, and this long time conflict was ready to break out into WAR. I stopped it (Biden has hurt the longer term prospects with some very stupid decisions, but I will fix it, again!). Another case is Egypt and Ethiopia, and their fight over a massive dam that is having an effect on the magnificent Nile River. There is peace, at least for now, because of my intervention, and it will stay that way! Likewise, we will have PEACE, soon, between Israel and Iran! Many calls and meetings now taking place. I do a lot, and never get credit for anything, but thatâs OK, the PEOPLE understand. MAKE THE MIDDLE EAST GREAT AGAIN!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114687664442020232" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114687664442020232" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2016"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 28, 2016  08:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;not anymore. The beginning of the end was the horrible Iran deal</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_814114980983427073" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/814114980983427073" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 16, 2020  12:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @IvankaTrump: The Abraham Accords are signed!  Today&#x27;s historic signing proves that the nations of the Middle East are breaking free from the failed approaches of the past.  After decades of division and conflict</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1306084861900447744" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1306084861900447744" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 01, 2020  11:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @DNI_Ratcliffe: Today’s agreement between Israel and the United Arab Emirates is a historic step towards a more peaceful Middle East. Congratulations @realDonaldTrump for bringing together two of America’s most reliable regional partners to expand diplomatic and security cooperation. https://t.co/y1DTzmxQZn&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1300640592544890880" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1300640592544890880" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 24, 2025  15:17</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Both Israel and Iran wanted to stop the War, equally! It was my great honor to Destroy All Nuclear facilities &amp;amp; capability, and then, STOP THE WAR!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114739003459183372" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114739003459183372" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 24, 2013  17:29</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;What a rotten deal we made with Iran. We get nothing (except laughter at our stupidity). They get everything</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_404753582937100288" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/404753582937100288" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 01, 2025  23:28</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Statements of Support for Middle East Peace Deal&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_115301502762018573" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/115301502762018573" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 24, 2020  00:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;HUGE win today for the United States and for peace in the world. Sudan has agreed to a peace and normalization agreement with Israel! With the United Arab Emirates and Bahrain</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1319683876046934016" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1319683876046934016" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 24, 2017  05:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Iran just test-fired a Ballistic Missile capable of reaching Israel.They are also working with North Korea.Not much of an agreement we have!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_911711539815702529" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/911711539815702529" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 17, 2014  15:34</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;After destroying the Middle East &amp; our economy</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_545331146268372992" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/545331146268372992" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 08, 2023  19:51</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">“Why the Iran Deal Matters—It was the first in a series of hugely consequential lies that will shape our country as much as the Middle East” https://www.tabletmag.com/sections/israel-middle-east/articles/why-iran-deal-matters</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111201135250531662" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111201135250531662" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 09, 2018  06:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Iran Deal is defective at its core. If we do nothing</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_993976643898281984" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/993976643898281984" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2026"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2026.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 09, 2026  22:29</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Iran is doing a very poor job, dishonorable some would say, of allowing Oil to go through the Strait of Hormuz. That is not the agreement we have! President DONALD J. TRUMP</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_116377109535639790" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/116377109535639790" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 29, 2023  19:27</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">RT @JaredKushner“If we can contain Iran, we can contain the resources they have to cause trouble” - This morning, I joined @mariabartiromo to discuss the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111319951162283422" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111319951162283422" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2018  06:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;...peace treaty with Israel. We have taken Jerusalem</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_948322497602220032" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/948322497602220032" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 05, 2020  00:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Another great day for peace with Middle East – Muslim-majority Kosovo and Israel have agreed to normalize ties and establish diplomatic relations. Well-done! More Islamic and Arab nations will follow soon!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1301924019147616257" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1301924019147616257" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 10, 2014  20:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Middle Eastern countries must participate militarily (no running away) and big league financially in order for us to go in and save them!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_509876756871131136" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/509876756871131136" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 16, 2025  22:49</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Ending the sanctions on Syriaâ¦</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114519952063614449" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114519952063614449" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2026"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2026.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 11, 2026  18:54</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">I have just finished meeting with Prime Minister Netanyahu, of Israel, and various of his Representatives. It was a very good meeting, the tremendous relationship between our two Countries continues. There was nothing definitive reached other than I insisted that negotiations with Iran continue to see whether or not a Deal can be consummated. If it can, I let the Prime Minister know that will be a preference. If it cannot, we will just have to see what the outcome will be. Last time Iran decided that they were better off not making a Deal, and they were hit with Midnight Hammer — That did not work well for them. Hopefully this time they will be more reasonable and responsible. Additionally, we discussed the tremendous progress being made in Gaza, and the Region in general. There is truly PEACE in the Middle East. Thank you for your attention to this matter! PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_116053512461029874" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/116053512461029874" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 15, 2024  09:56</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Russia is now calling for RESTRAINT in the war with Israel and Iran — AN ALL TIME CLASSIC!!!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112274636400979721" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112274636400979721" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 29, 2013  07:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Let the Arab League take care of Syria. Why are these rich Arab countries not paying us for the tremendous cost of such an attack?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_373058887404228608" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/373058887404228608" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 31, 2024  06:13</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Three years ago we had PEACE IN THE MIDDLE EAST!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111849087320309687" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111849087320309687" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 11, 2020  00:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Another HISTORIC breakthrough today! Our two GREAT friends Israel and the Kingdom of Morocco have agreed to full diplomatic relations – a massive breakthrough for peace in the Middle East!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1337067073051238400" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1337067073051238400" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 02, 2015  13:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;A terrible deal with Iran! https://instagram.com/p/7I0gD0GhX2/&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_639140140389167105" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/639140140389167105" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 17, 2018  21:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I had a great meeting with NATO. They have paid $33 Billion more and will pay hundreds of Billions of Dollars more in the future</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1019218575691837443" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1019218575691837443" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article></div>
```


::: {.seal-divider}
![](../assets/seal.svg){width=60}
:::

[← Back to all topics](../themes.qmd){.small-caps}
